title: alchemilla acutiloba subsp. mollis
intro: Alchemilla acutiloba subsp. mollis, also known as a type of lady's mantle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla acutiloba subsp. mollis can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
